topics.title: Howard Stern Film Festival Logistics
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming plans and production details for the Howard Stern Film Festival, including film synopses, red carpet coverage, and coordination between radio and television broadcasts.

topics.title: Radio Show Logistics and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming guest appearances, a prank call featuring a spliced voice of Andrew Dice Clay, and the etymology of various ethnic slurs.

topics.title: Radio Industry Dynamics and Media Scandals
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of radio censorship, corporate contract disputes involving David Lee Roth, and a lawsuit regarding the production environment of the Maury Povich show.

topics.title: Dancing with the Stars Preparation
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding the complexities of ballroom dancing and the logistical challenges of participating in Dancing with the Stars.

topics.title: Dancing with the Stars and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses potential participation in "Dancing with the Stars," a guest's upcoming appearance, and various rumors regarding celebrity relationships.

topics.title: Jenna Jameson Encounter
topics.summary: The studio features a guest recounting a series of encounters with Jenna Jameson, including an incident in a bathroom and a shared performance at a club.

topics.title: Jenny McCarthy Lie Detector Test
topics.summary: The studio features Jenny McCarthy undergoing a lie detector test to verify her claims regarding past sexual encounters and personal experiences.

topics.title: Jenny McCarthy Interview and Production Updates
topics.summary: The studio features a segment with Jenny McCarthy followed by discussions regarding upcoming radio scripts, production plans for a new sitcom, and reactions to recent television and film media.

topics.title: Radio Industry Transitions and Personal Relationships
topics.summary: The show addresses the transition of Opie and Anthony to a new station, Howard Stern’s move to satellite radio, and a series of personal updates regarding guests including China Doll and attorney Dominic Barber.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Film Critiques
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding personal relationship histories, the production of an independent film, and a comedic exchange about a comedian's backstage experience.

topics.title: Comedy Club Anecdotes and Film Festival Discussions
topics.summary: The studio explores stories of backstage interactions with other comedians, the selection process for a film festival, and various news items including proposed legislation on sex toys and media reactions to political portraits.

topics.title: Host Interactions and Studio Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including listener feedback regarding co-host Artie, discussions about former colleague Tom Ciusano, a debate over Scott the engineer's bowling score, and various comedic bits involving guest appearances and internal production jokes.

topics.title: Porn Film Pitch and Police Call
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding a lie-detector-themed adult film pitch followed by an interview with a female police officer from Maryland.

topics.title: Upcoming Show Segments and Music Selection
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming segments featuring guest appearances, a discussion on illegal eBay listings, and the selection of music for the broadcast.

topics.title: Pancreatic Cancer Diagnosis and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a caller's terminal pancreatic cancer diagnosis, reports on a drunk Russian diplomat's accident, and mocks Tom Cruise's parenting choices.

topics.title: Current Events and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including federal energy policies, international news reports from the Middle East and Greece, legal proceedings for 9/11 conspirators, celebrity updates on Diane Sawyer and Sally Field, and upcoming musical and comedy performances.
